purpose: PostToolUse hook on Write. Validates dashboards/{id}/master_state.json for required fields and correct types: last_updated (string ISO 8601), completed (array), in_progress (array), failed (array), upstream_results (object), next_agent_number (number > 0). A malformed master_state.json makes compaction recovery impossible — but this is a warn-only PostToolUse hook (cannot block), so it surfaces the issue to the master agent for self-correction.
gotchas: PostToolUse cannot block — issues warnings only
Validates presence + type but not deep semantics (e.g., completed entries having {id, summary} keys)
next_agent_number must be > 0 — checks via jq comparison, not just type
Reads from disk (post-write) not from tool_input — sees actual landed state
patterns: Type assertions per field via `field | type`
Trailing-comma trim on accumulator MISSING_FIELDS string
